title: Neutrality Loathsome.
content:
God will have all, or none; serve Him, or fall
    Down before Baal, Bel, or Belial:
    Either be hot or cold: God doth despise,
    Abhor, and spew out all neutralities.
meaning:
"Neutrality Loathsome." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
